title: Irish Semolina Cake
description: A moist and flavorful cake made with Irish semolina flour, perfect for a delicious breakfast or snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina flour, light brown sugar, and deliciously dark chocolate chips.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
